overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player traverses neon-lit sidewalks, crosses a wide intersection dominated by massive holographic advertisements, and enters a narrower avenue with sleek cyan-accented architecture. Heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces and atmospheric haze throughout the dense urban environment.

events.description: exiting covered walkway section into open intersection approach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along rain-soaked sidewalk next to metal railings, passing digital billboards and palm trees

black metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street drop-off
tall pole-mounted digital screen displaying rotating advertisements
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian promenade during a heavy downpour, with a distinctive green-lit commercial building dominating the right side. Metal railings line the edge of the walkway, while palm trees and digital billboards punctuate the scene. The wet concrete reflects the neon signage as the camera approaches an open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with holographic advertising towers

events.description: stepping off curb to begin crossing wide multi-lane intersection
futuristic sports car passes by on the right while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide multi-lane intersection, navigating between passing vehicles and other pedestrians while heading toward massive holographic displays

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking past ego in opposite direction
futuristic black sports car with glowing accents driving through the intersection

entered.detail: giant floating holographic advertisement display with red and pink neon lighting dominating the intersection skyline
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt
tall industrial pole with traffic signals and additional street lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast rain-slicked intersection dominated by massive floating holographic advertisements emitting red and pink neon light. The camera crosses the wide asphalt expanse marked with crosswalk stripes, navigating around futuristic vehicles and other pedestrians. A person with an umbrella passes by as the camera continues toward the opposite side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern commercial avenue with cyan neon architectural accents

events.description: entering narrower street with modern buildings featuring distinctive cyan neon trim

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of a modern avenue, passing sleek buildings with glowing cyan architectural lighting and elevated highway ramps overhead

entered.detail: sleek contemporary building with distinctive glowing cyan neon edges outlining the glass facade
overhead elevated roadway structure with illuminated edges spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrower modern avenue, the camera passes beneath an elevated highway ramp with glowing cyan accents. The architecture shifts to sleek buildings with distinctive cyan neon trim lining the edges. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient lighting as the camera proceeds down this less crowded commercial street with sparse pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian promenade through a sprawling neon intersection and into a sleek, cyan-lit urban avenue. It begins along a covered walkway during a heavy downpour, passing a green-lit commercial building and digital billboards that reflect off the wet concrete. As the camera reaches the end of the promenade, the scene opens into a vast, rain-slicked intersection dominated by massive floating holographic advertisements in red and pink. The camera then crosses the wide asphalt expanse, navigating past futuristic vehicles and pedestrians before passing beneath an elevated highway ramp. Finally, the environment shifts into a narrower avenue characterized by sleek architecture and glowing cyan neon trim lining the edges of the reflective street.
